value_chain_position: Non-invasive prenatal and carrier screening diagnostics; sells cfDNA-based UNITY test consumables and sequencing kits to OBGYNs and clinical labs for fetal aneuploidy and carrier screening.
relative_comps: BillionToOne competes in the NIPS/carrier screening market dominated by Natera (NTRA) and Roche. Its differentiated angle is a proprietary molecular counting technology enabling higher sensitivity at lower cost, particularly for fetal RhD and single-gene disorder detection that NTRA's Panorama does not cover as well. The 98.5% YoY revenue growth (albeit off a smaller base) reflects rapid clinical adoption. Against NTRA, BLLN is earlier stage but with a real technology differentiation; NTRA still commands dominant market share. FCF margin of 7.9% is thin but positive — rare for a diagnostics company at this stage. Load-bearing score of 4 because its molecular counting platform is genuinely hard to replicate.
